metadata.purpose: Claude-optimized execution protocol for Bend integration phases

executionPrinciples.principle: Work in phases. Never attempt more than one workstream in a single context window.
Compact context before starting each new phase. Use /compact or summarize to handoff packet.
Run cargo test after every file modification. Never proceed with failing tests.
Use subagents for exploration and heavy file reading. Keep main context for decisions and code changes.
Create each new module with tests immediately. Never defer tests to "later".
Pin non-negotiables in every prompt: test baseline 1034+, zero warnings, project path h:/programing language/axon/.
If context approaches 80K tokens, stop, create handoff packet, and start new session.

phase.entryCondition: No preconditions. This is the first phase.
phase.exitCondition: All 1,034+ tests pass. Diagnostics accumulate. PassManager operational. 100+ snapshots. Handoff packet created.

handoffPacket.field: filesCreated (list of new files with line counts)

phase.entryCondition: ALPHA handoff packet loaded. PassManager confirmed operational.
phase.exitCondition: Fusion 3x verified. Parallelism 2x verified. Fold/reduce functional. 200+ new tests.

handoffPacket.field: filesCreated (list of new files with line counts)

phase.entryCondition: BETA handoff packet loaded. Fusion and parallelism confirmed working.
phase.exitCondition: Linear types enforced. Zero-copy verified on 5+ patterns. ADT layouts benchmarked.

handoffPacket.field: filesCreated (list of new files with line counts)

phase.exitCondition: with-blocks working. Docs updated. Math-notation designed.

handoffPacket.field: filesCreated (list of new files with line counts)

phase.exitCondition: Design documents written and reviewed. No code changes.

handoffPacket.field: designDocsCreated (list of design documents with summaries)

scenario.name: ContextOverflow
scenario.symptom: Error during execution messages, sluggish responses, or repeated tool failures suggesting context limits.
scenario.action: Immediately stop. Run /compact. Create handoff packet. Resume in new session with packet.

scenario.name: TestRegression
scenario.symptom: Existing test fails after code change.
scenario.action: Do NOT proceed. Diagnose root cause. Fix regression before any new work. If fix requires major refactor, create risk entry in handoff packet.

scenario.name: CompilationFailure
scenario.action: Read error output carefully. Fix in smallest possible diff. Run cargo test after fix. Do not accumulate multiple unfixed errors.

scenario.name: FusionIncorrectness
scenario.symptom: Fused output differs from unfused by more than epsilon.
scenario.action: Disable fusion for that pattern. Add failing test. Debug numerical issue. Do not ship incorrect fusion.

scenario.name: ParallelismDeadlock
scenario.symptom: Test hangs indefinitely or produces non-deterministic failures.
scenario.action: Kill process. Revert to sequential execution for affected pass. Add timeout to parallel tests. Investigate dependency graph for cycles.

scenario.name: LinkerShadowing
scenario.symptom: Unexpected linker errors on Windows — Git's link.exe shadows MSVC linker.
scenario.action: Set LINK environment variable to point to MSVC's link.exe. Verify with where link.exe before retrying.

sessionStartChecklist.step: Load handoff packet from previous phase (if not ALPHA).
Run cargo test and confirm baseline test count matches handoff packet.
Run cargo build and confirm zero warnings.
Load only the plan documents relevant to the current workstream.
Create todo list for the session's deliverables.

sessionEndChecklist.step: Run cargo test — all tests must pass.
Run cargo build — zero warnings required.
Create handoff packet with all required fields.
Summarize what was accomplished and what remains.
List any open risks or blockers for next session.
